Promotion

Bet Builder Boost

Key Terms

18+. Min Odds of (). Max stake £/€. Available on one bet per event. Boost % can vary. Boost will be added once all selections have settled. Max boost payout £/€. Offer does not apply to multiple bets. Free/void/cashed out bets won't qualify. T&Cs apply.

Who can qualify?

Customers must be 18 or over to participate.
Customers from United Kingdom & Ireland only.

How do I qualify?

Place a Bet Builder bet with minimum odds of .

Apply boost to the bet.
Available on one bet per event.

What do I get?

Receive a fixed percentage boost on your winning Bet Builder.

Is there anything else I need to know?

Max stake £/€.

Max boost payout £/€.

Offer is available to new and existing customers.

Free Bets, cashed out or voided bets will not qualify for this promotion.

Offer does not apply to multiple bets.

Other Important information

 

Promotion cancellation or variation

We can cancel this promotion or change these terms and conditions where necessary to comply with law or regulation, to prevent fraud or similar unlawful behavior, or by giving you notice beforehand, if the change or cancellation is for any other valid reason such as a software fault or incorrect terms and conditions. Any such variation or cancellation will not apply to you if you have commenced play in relation to the promotion, prior to the date of the communication of the variation or cancellation.

Standard BoyleSports Terms & Conditions apply.

Free Bets & Account restrictions

Free bets do not qualify for this promotion.

Other restrictions

Any customers found to have attempted to open duplicate accounts will have bonuses removed from all of their accounts.

Discard bet?

If you leave now your selections will be lost.

        Best Odds Guaranteed

        Best Odds Guaranteed on all UK/Irish horse racing. Applies to UK/Irish races. Applies to UK/IRE customers. T&Cs apply.

        Best Odds Guaranteed on all BAGS/BEGS. greyhound races Applies to BAGS/BEGS races. Applies to UK/IRE customers. T&Cs apply.

        See full terms & conditions

        How to get Best Odds Guaranteed:

        Take an early or board price on any UK/Irish Horse Racing.

        Take an early or board price on all BAGS/BEGS greyhound races only.

        If the starting price (SP) is greater we will pay the best price.

        Terms and Conditions:

        Win or EW bets placed on UK & Irish horse racing only.

        Win or EW bets placed on all BAGS/BEGS greyhounds races only.

        Bets placed after the off do not qualify for this offer. Bets placed in-running will not apply.

        The offer does not include Ante-Post, Tote/Pools, Place Only or Match Bets.

        In the event of a Rule 4, we pay you at the bigger odds, after the Rule 4 deduction has been applied.

        Free bets cashed out or voided bets will not qualify for this promotion.

        Applies to UK and Ireland online and Fon-A-Bet customers only.

        Standard BoyleSports Terms & Conditions Apply.

        Best Odds Guaranteed promotions should be permitted on all bet types including Multiple Bets.

        Deposit Notice

        ACCA Boost
        • Boost your winnings on 3+ fold Accas.
        • The more legs included in the Acca, the bigger the Boost you will receive.
        • All legs must have minimum odds of 1/5.
        • Min stake £/€0.05.
        • Maximum bonus winnings £/€1000 per Boost.
        • Boost percentages start at 5% for 3-fold Accas and increase with each additional leg, reaching 100% at 20+ folds.
        • For Each Way accumulators, Acca Boost only applies if both the win part and place part have won.
        • For Each Way accumulators, the Acca Boost percentage applies to the win part of the bet only. The place part is not included in the boost calculation.
        ACCA Insure
        • Get your stake back as a free bet if one leg from your 5+ fold Acca loses.
        • All legs must have minimum odds of 1/5.
        • Min stake £/€0.05.
        • Maximum free bet refund per unique bet £/€20.
        • For Each Way accumulators, Acca Insurance only applies if both the win part and place part have lost. If the place part wins, Acca Insurance will not be applied.
        Read Terms and Conditions
        Terms and Conditions
        1. Acca Rewards is available to all new and existing BoyleSports online customers aged 18+.
        2. Acca Rewards only applies to bets placed on the following sports: Athletics, Aussie Rules, Badminton, Baseball, Basketball, Volleyball, Bowls, Boxing, Cricket, Cycling, Darts, Field Hockey, Football, Futsal, Gaelic Games, Golf, Handball, Ice Hockey, Motorsports, Netball, NFL, Pool, Rowing, Rugby, Show Jumping, Snooker, Speedway, Squash, Horse Racing, Greyhound Racing, Table Tennis, Tennis, UFC, Water polo and Winter Sports.
        3. Customers can choose either ACCA Boost or ACCA Insure to their 5+ fold Acca. Both offers cannot be applied to the same Acca.
        4. Min odds of 1/5 per selection/leg.
        5. Free Bets, price boosts, specials, super boosts and Best Odds Guaranteed are not eligible for Acca Rewards and cannot be used in conjunction with any other promotion. If you opt in for Acca Boost on an accumulator containing racing selections, Best Odds Guaranteed will not apply to those selections.
        6. Cashed out & void bets will not apply for Acca Rewards.
        7. Acca rewards is only available on the first unique Acca. If another Acca is placed with the same selections, Acca Rewards won’t be available.
        8. Free bet & promotion restricted customers will not qualify for Acca
        9. Any Acca Boost winnings or Acca Insure free bet returns will be applied within 15min of qualifying Acca settlement.
        10. Standard BoyleSports Terms & Conditions Apply

        UFC Betting & Odds 

        BoyleSports is the premier destination for UFC and MMA betting. You’ll find long-term outright betting, competitive odds on every bout and extensive In-Play markets. And you can wager on every major UFC pay-per-view event and Fight Night, as well as other top promotions like Cage Warriors and the PFL. 


        Sign up to BoyleSports and check out all our upcoming MMA and UFC fight night betting markets.  


          

        Understanding UFC Odds  


        At BoyleSports, you’ll see our UFC odds written as fractional odds. A simple example is odds of 4/1. A fighter with odds of 4/1 has a theoretical 20% (one in five) chance of winning the fight. Understanding the odds also helps you calculate your potential winnings. If you wagered £10 on a fighter with odds of 4/1, a successful bet would pay out £40. You also get your original stake back for a total of £50.  


        Let’s look at an example from a previous fight. In the most recent Conor McGregor vs. Dustin Poirier fight in 2021, Poirier was an 8/15 favourite and McGregor was a 6/4 underdog. If you bet on Poirier with a £15 bet this would return £8 profit. Whereas if you backed McGregor with a £4 bet, it would return £6 profit. 


        The below table gives some examples of fractional odds and their potential payouts.  


        Stake 

        Odds 

        Winnings 

        Stake returned 

        Total winnings 

        £1 

        25/1 

        £25 

        £1 

        £26 

        £1 

        7/1 

        £7 

        £1 

        £8 

        £1 

        11/2 

        £5.50 

        £1 

        £6.50 

        £1 

        9/4 

        £2.25 

        £1 

        £3.25 

        £1 

        10/11 

        £0.91 

        £1 

        £1.91 

          


        MMA odds reflect a fighter’s implied probability of winning the fight. They can fluctuate in line with various factors leading up to the fight including recent form, the head-to-head between the fighters, the fighting style of each of the competitors, and any news to come out of the training camps. Any last-minute opponent changes can have a dramatic effect on the odds too.  


        At BoyleSports, we consistently offer competitive odds across all the major MMA events.  


          

        How to Bet on UFC & MMA  


        It’s simple to bet on UFC and MMA with BoyleSports. It works like this:  


        Step 1: Navigate to the MMA/UFC Section: Click on the MMA/UFC tab on the sports homepage or go directly to our main page.  

        Step 2: Choose Your Fight: Browse the list of upcoming fight nights and competitions. Click on the fixture you want to bet on to see all available markets. 

        Step 3: Select Your Bet: Find the market you’re interested in – whether Fight Winner, Method of Victory or Round Betting – and click on the odds next to your chosen selection. This will add it to your betslip. 

        Step 4: Place Your Stake: On the betslip, enter the amount you wish to wager (your stake). You will see your potential returns calculated automatically. 

        Step 5: Confirm Your Bet: Once you’re happy with your selection and stake, click the "Place Bet" button to confirm your wager. 


          

        Popular UFC & MMA Betting Markets  


        You’ll find a fantastic selection of UFC and MMA betting markets at BoyleSports. Some of the most popular bets include:  


        1. Fight Winner: Bet on which of the two competitors will win an upcoming bout. 

        2. Method of Victory: Bet on how the fight is won, such as by a knockout (KO), technical knockout (TKO), disqualification, submission, or decision. For example, you could bet on a KO for a known power-hitter like Francis Ngannou. 

        3. Round Winner: Bet on which fighter is judged to have won each round. 

        4. Winning Round: Bet on which round the fight will end in. This is ideal for knowledgeable bettors. You can put your knowledge of each fighter to the test and tap into their historical win stats to understand the rounds in which they have the best chance of reigning supreme.  

        5. Will the Fight Go the Distance: Bet on whether or not a bout will finish without a knockout or other stoppage, and will be decided by the judges. 

        6. Total Rounds: Bet on whether the fight will last for over or under a certain number of rounds, such as over or under 1.5 rounds. 


        At BoyleSports, you can also bet live In-Play on the top UFC and MMA bouts. As soon as the fight begins, the live odds open. Popular live bets include fight winner, method of victory and next round winner.  

         

        Explore our full range of In-Play MMA markets and bet live as the action unfolds in the Octagon.  

         

          

        Top UFC & MMA Competitions & Outrights  

         

        MMA and UFC betting has never been more popular. You’ll have access to betting markets for a variety of MMA competitions at BoyleSports, including: 

         

        UFC 

         

        The world’s premier mixed martial arts organisation, Ultimate Fighting Championship (UFC) was founded by Dana White and the Fertilla brothers in 1993. It first began life as an underground fighting league in Denver, and has now grown to be the biggest game in town. You’ll find a weekly schedule of Fight Nights to bet on, plus high-profile pay-per-view events across the season. Some of the most famous fighters down the years have included Conor McGregor, Dustin Poirier, Georges St-Pierre, Jon Jones, Anderson Silva, Khabib Nurmagomedov, and Amanda Nune. 

         


        Cage Warriors 

         

        Cage Warriors is a major UK-based, Irish-owned MMA promoter. Cage Warriors offers plenty of MMA betting opportunities, and is known for exciting matchups with emerging talent. It’s a great way to find out about new and up-and-coming fighters who may go on to dominate the sport. 

         


        Professional Fighters League (PFL)  

         

        The Professional Fighters League was first created in 2018 when it was known as the World Series of Fighting (WSOF). Since then, it’s enjoyed a huge rise in popularity and know rivals some of the top competitions in MMA. It consists of a regular season, play-offs and finals, and carries a prize purse of $1million. The PFL acquired Bellator MMA in 2023 and has now integrated it into its tournament style-format.  

         

        At BoyleSports, you’ll find outright betting markets on all the top MMA events. An outright bet is a long-term bet on a future outcome, such as the next champion of a specific weight class. 

         

        Sign up to BoyleSports and place your bets on the next UFC champion in our outright UFC betting markets.  

         

          

        Bet on UFC at BoyleSports 

         

        Whether you’re betting on UFC or PFL, you can rest assured that we’re committed to providing a safe and secure betting environment for all our players. We promote responsible gambling to help you stay in control of your betting experience. For more information, visit BeGambleAware.org and GamCare. 

         

        You’ll also find a range of UFC and MMA betting promotions and offers with BoyleSports, including Price Boosts on the biggest UFC and MMA fights. Plus Acca Rewards and Cash Out, so you can settle your bet before the fight has finished.  

         

        Sign up to BoyleSports or log in to your existing account to bet on MMA with us.

        Ireland & all other accepted jurisdictions
        BOYLE Sports is operated by Boylesports (Gibraltar) Limited, Company Number 112469, Licence Number 1010144 of registered address Suite 23, Portland House, Glacis Road, GX11 1AA, Gibraltar. BOYLE Sports is licensed and regulated by the Government of Gibraltar and regulated by the Gibraltar Gambling Commissioner (RGL 083 & 084).

        We value your privacy

        By clicking “Accept All Cookies”, you agree to the storing of cookies on your device to enhance site navigation, analyze site usage, and assist in our marketing efforts. Privacy & Cookie Policy

        Privacy Preference Centre

        When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings. However, blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.
        Privacy & Cookie Policy

        Manage Consent Preferences

        Strictly Necessary Cookies

        Always Active

        These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.

        Performance Cookies

        These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.

        Functional Cookies

        These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.

        Targeting Cookies

        These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.
